riskSummary.oneLiner: Concurrent opioid and benzodiazepine exposure is present, and key prescribing documentation elements are not clearly documented.

priorityFindings.title: Opioid + benzodiazepine overlap
priorityFindings.whyItMatters: An active benzodiazepine appears alongside a proposed opioid, which may increase sedation and overdose risk.

priorityFindings.title: PDMP documentation not detected
priorityFindings.whyItMatters: PDMP review may have occurred, but it is not clearly documented in the note.

priorityFindings.title: Monitoring and risk discussion are limited
priorityFindings.whyItMatters: The note provides limited evidence of monitoring, counseling, or risk-mitigation planning.

suggestedChartLanguage: Reviewed PDMP today; document any recent controlled-substance fills, care-coordination concerns, and rationale before finalizing.
Treatment goal is short-term improvement in pain control and daily functioning.
Discussed sedation precautions, medication risks, and follow-up expectations.
safetyNote: RX Guard provides clinician-support guidance only and does not make autonomous prescribing decisions.
